description: Creates a new group-level [logging service](/docs/logs/external-logs) within a specified group in your Fivetran account.

group_id.description: The unique identifier for the group within the Fivetran system

service.description: The name of the log service type within the Fivetran system. We support the following log services: `azure_monitor_log`, `cloudwatch`, `datadog_log`, `grafana_loki`, `splunkLog`, `new_relic_log`, `stackdriver` (Google Cloud Logging).

enabled.description: The boolean value specifying whether the log service is enabled.
